pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 65, export_result.sh line 11
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 8-10 (DOCS_DIR and PDF_PATH)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves uploading a synthetically-generated PDF file to a GRC system (Eramba). The risk entry 'Phishing Attacks on Employees' and the attachment 'phishing_simulation_report_2025.pdf' are both created during task setup via shell scripts. The PDF content is entirely fabricated, containing only fictional metrics about a phishing simulation exercise at 'ACME CORP' (2,500 employees, 74% open rate, 5% click rate, 0.48% credential submission rate). No real PII, employee names, credentials, or sensitive organizational data are present. All data is generated locally within the test environment.
